headline: Linde plc (LIN) Rose on Investors Favour Its Defensive Business Profile
summary: Impax Asset Management, an investment management firm based in London, specializing in sustainable investing, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for its “Impax Global Environmental Markets Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Fund stood resilient in the quarter by outperforming its primary benchmark, the MSCI ACWI index. The stock […]
